parsed.explanation: 1. Fixed inconsistent tag <PRIZE> to <PRICE> for consistency. 2. Closed unclosed <BIBL> tag for 'Memoires de Rochester'. 3. Replaced corrupted Unicode characters (e.g., \u221a\u00fc) with their proper representations (e.g., 'ß', 'ö', '°'). 4. Ensured all <BIBL> elements are properly nested and closed. 5. Added missing root <file> tag closure. 6. Standardized special symbols (e.g., † for cross symbols). 7. Corrected 'Anf\u221a\u00a7ng' to 'Anfang'.
